author.bio: Geek. Specialist in obscure details. Imagine this bio contains all the hashtags you’re interested in on Twitter. Get just my blog feed on @CtrlBlog. 🏳️‍🌈
author.name: Daniel Aleksandersen

content.text: Why not use _dnslink.$domain? Reduces data usage since you’re not mixing in TXT records that may be under a the main domain for all kinds of other purposes. Some more arguments for using a subdomain for this: https://github.com/ipfs/specs/issues/76#issuecomment-462334040
content.html: Why not use _dnslink.$domain? Reduces data usage since you’re not mixing in TXT records that may be under a the main domain for all kinds of other purposes. Some more arguments for using a subdomain for this: https://github.com/ipfs/specs/issues/76#issuecomment-462334040
